nasb.text: By faith Jacob, as he was dying, blessed each of the sons of Joseph, and worshiped, leaning on the top of his staff.

esv.text: By faith Jacob, when dying, blessed each of the sons of Joseph, bowing in worship over the head of his staff.

cnv.text: 因著信，雅各臨死的時候，分別為約瑟的兒子祝福，又倚著杖頭敬拜　神。

ccb.text: 雅各凭信心在临终之时分别为约瑟的两个儿子祝福，并拄着拐杖敬拜上帝。

csbs.text: 因着信，雅各临死的时候，祝福了约瑟的每个儿子，又倚着自己的杖头敬拜神。
